texts: Digital Exploitation & Brain Surveillance Case of Charles Tanauan (Master Kanor)
A Full Documentary & Presidential Report on Technological Abuse, Identity Theft, and Cyber Exploitation in Tacloban City, Philippines (2014–2025)
Content Creator | Online Seller | Influencer Manager | Digital Agency Owner

This report presents the real-life experience of Charles Tanauan, known as Master Kanor, who alleges that he was a victim of digital identity theft, crypto fraud, unauthorized psychological surveillance, and cyber sabotage by local entities and shadow cybersecurity networks in Tacloban City. It includes a timeline of events, list of involved parties, agency responses, and a call for urgent action.
Began as a content creator on YouTube.
Shifted to online selling due to low income.
Returned to content creation full-time during COVID-19.
Became an influencer manager and agency founder.
Managed Shopee, Lazada, TikTok, casino services, and influencer marketing teams.
Digital wallets and identities were being used remotely.
Found that personal accounts were being accessed.
Suspected brain reader chip was used to track thoughts, dreams, and surroundings.
Realized a close friend had been
paid to make him ingest the chip
NBI Tacloban and PNP RACU 8 Cybercrime
who ridiculed and dismissed the complaint.
Believed to be part of the suppression effort.
Incident was recorded while brain reader device was allegedly active.
Identified the presence of two key actors:
, operating as a shadow cybersecurity entity.
Claimed that these groups had control over the case and digital systems in Region 8.
Wallets and identity used for crypto-based fundraising without permission.
PART 5: BRAIN READER CHIP - PHYSICAL & PSYCHOLOGICAL EFFECTS
Claimed chip allowed remote access to:
Surveillance of Personal Life (Visual, Audio, Dreams)
Suppression by Local Authorities & Cybersecurity Units
Mental and Physical Abuse Without Consent
PART 8: FORMAL REQUEST TO THE PRESIDENT
